options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <transition_limit> # Transition limit value (float, required, min=-1000000, max=1000000) <object_list> # List of objects: ports, instance pins, library cell pins, clocks or current_design

options.name: -clock_path
options.description: Apply the transition limit constraint to pins in the clock network of the clocks defined in object_list

options.name: -data_path
options.description: Apply the transition limit constraint to data path pins, where the path is launched by the clocks defined in object_list

options.name: -fall
options.description: Apply the transition limit constraint to falling transitions

options.name: -override
options.description: Overrides transition limit from other sources namely library/constraints

options.name: -rise
options.description: Apply the transition limit constraint to rising transitions
